name: pow-poll-clickup
description: Polls ClickUp every 15 min for Protect Our Winters tasks in 'Ready to Build' or 'Ready to Deploy' and runs the matching pipeline stage
notes: Primary trigger for the pipeline. Processes ONE task per tick (oldest first, Ready-to-Build prioritized over Ready-to-Deploy). Cloud routine schedule minimum is 1 hour per Claude Code docs — */15 may be rounded up to hourly in practice. If so, accept hourly cadence. RESIN_ALLOW_PROD_DEPLOY=1 is required because a poll that picks up a 'Ready to Deploy' task will inline the /deploy-prod workflow, which runs prod-deploy commands gated by block-sf-data-changes.sh.
